'''竏嗹-dh-f-w''' ('''shawadhfewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naai|naai]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naai|naai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗹-dh-f-w
|-
! Lemma
| shawadhfewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadhfewoko|thiwadhfewoko]] || [[word:jiwadhfewoko|jiwadhfewoko]] || [[word:shiwadhfewoko|shiwadhfewoko]] || [[word:kiwadhfewoko|kiwadhfewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadhfewoko|thuthuwadhfewoko]] || [[word:jujuwadhfewoko|jujuwadhfewoko]] || [[word:shushuwadhfewoko|shushuwadhfewoko]] || [[word:kukuwadhfewoko|kukuwadhfewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowadhfewoko|thowadhfewoko]] || [[word:jowadhfewoko|jowadhfewoko]] || [[word:showadhfewoko|showadhfewoko]] || [[word:kowadhfewoko|kowadhfewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadhfewoko|thowadhfewoko]] || [[word:jowadhfewoko|jowadhfewoko]] || [[word:showadhfewoko|showadhfewoko]] || [[word:kowadhfewoko|kowadhfewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦwadhfewoko|thﾃｦwadhfewoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦwadhfewoko|jﾃｦwadhfewoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦwadhfewoko|shﾃｦwadhfewoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦwadhfewoko|kﾃｦwadhfewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawadhfewoko|thawadhfewoko]] || [[word:jawadhfewoko|jawadhfewoko]] || [[word:shawadhfewoko|shawadhfewoko]] || [[word:kawadhfewoko|kawadhfewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
